title: Buro

{{Quote|About ten days ago, our leader gave me an assignment to wipe the navicomputers of a geological survey ship. Through carelessness and neglect, its crew had destroyed a forest on the planet Kaisa and had caused the extinction of the Buro, a species of ethereally beautiful sentient insects. My job was to make sure that the survey ship's navicomputer would never again guide its geologists to a new world they could destroy.|Lusa, a member of the Diversity Alliance|<ref name="DoG" />}}
The '''Buro''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that were considered ethereally beautiful by some other species. They were native to [[Kaisa]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DoG" /> located in the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Kaisa system/Legends|Kaisa system]]</ref> The Buro had no presence offworld, but their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] did receive some visitors, among them a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-crewed, [[Geology|geological]] survey [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. The survey crew negligently destroyed a forest on Kaisa, and the destruction of this habitat led to the extinction of the Buro species.<ref name="DoG" />

In [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' to [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]].</ref> the [[Diversity Alliance]], an anti-Human organization, became aware of the extinction of the Buro and the role played by the survey crew. The Alliance's leader, [[Nolaa Tarkona]], tasked the [[Chironian]] operative [[Lusa]] with wiping clean the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computers]] of the survey crew's starship; their next jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] would see them emerge in uncharted territory. Lusa, however, was not prepared to go through with the act, and confessed her [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] to the [[Geologist/Legends|geologists]] before their departure.<ref name="DoG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Rebecca Moesta]] created the Buro for ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'', a young adults novel published by [[Berkley Boulevard]] in [[1997]].<ref name="DoG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' {{1stm}}
